description: Create a 3D elevation path for a hiking trail by draping the 2D trail vector (/home/ga/GIS_Data/proposed_trail_2d.geojson) over the Digital Elevation Model raster (/home/ga/GIS_Data/srtm_41_19.tif). Ensure the resulting layer contains valid Z values from the raster and export the final 3D trail as a GeoPackage to /home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/trail_3d.gpkg.
